# PT. SANNO

PT. SANNO is the first Tempered Glass factory in South Sulawesi. Our production facilities include Tempered Glass Manufacturing, Glass Cutting, Beveling, Polishing, and CNC Processing.

## Main Pages

- Home: https://sannoglass.com/
- About Us: https://sannoglass.com/about-us/
- Products: https://sannoglass.com/product/
- Projects: https://sannoglass.com/project/
- News: https://sannoglass.com/news/
- Contact Us: https://sannoglass.com/contact-us/

## Expertise

- Kaca Interior & Exterior
- Tempered Glass
- Laminated Glass
- Glass Processing
- CNC Glass Processing
- Glass Cutting
- Glass Polishing
- Glass Beveling

## Frequently Asked Topics

- What is tempered glass?
- Tempered glass manufacturing process
- Tempered vs laminated glass
- Architectural glass applications
- Safety glass solutions
